title: Pre-ticket audit: single-command live staged orchestrator proof
problem: Per-step live staged proofs exist for rank-1 (ticket-187) and rank-2 (ticket-190), but single-command live `research run --fixture-mode --staged-spine` on real OpenAlex without test patches is not proven.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-ticket audit answers orchestrator scope, env gates, CI exclusion, and rollback.
Verdict GO or NO-GO with hardened scope for follow-on implementation ticket.
rollback_plan: Remove audit report; retain per-step live proofs.
category: Phase 3 / live staged orchestration / product-risk reduction
